_meta.source: Synthetic seed data derived from SRTR PSR center-level reports (2019-2025)
_meta.method: Generated by scripts/generate-srtr-historical.py with realistic baselines, trends, and noise
_meta.notes: Synthetic data calibrated against published SRTR statistics. NOT real patient data. COVID-19 impact modeled in 2020. Null values for pancreas/intestine indicate years where center volume was too low for reportable metrics.
